Riverside power-breed rescue

The dogs no one else will take.

Underdog Heroes rehabs pit bulls, mastiffs, cane corsos, rottweilers, and bully mixes who were written off before anyone did the work.

Give monthly See happy endings

The rescue exists for the dogs with no other path. When time, money, behavior, or medical need has made everyone else step back, Underdog Heroes steps closer.

Proof, not slogans

The story is the rescue.

Mercy, Rosa, and Betty are the spine of the new site because they show the work better than a mission statement can.

Adopted

Mercy

Mercy was found in a box in the rain with her puppies. Most of the puppies died. Two were saved. Her soul looked broken, and the work was getting her to trust again.

Read the story

Adopted

Rosa

Rosa was so sick and skinny that many people thought euthanasia was the kindest option. The rescue refused the recommended amputation and treated her day after day.

Read the story

Adopted

Betty

Betty the mastiff was labeled aggressive and counted out. Her placement took a partner willing to be patient and accept that love would be an uphill battle.

Read the story
Four ways in

Pick the part of the work you can carry.

01 Adopt For prepared homes who can handle the truth before the form. 02 Foster Temporary homes where decompression and rehab can actually happen. 03 Volunteer Riverside hands for transport, walks, care work, and rescue logistics. 04 Give Monthly The Village gives the rescue a base before the next dog is in crisis.

The Village

$25 a month means the rescue is not starting from zero.

Viral posts help in emergencies. Monthly donors make the next yes possible before the next emergency happens.

Join the Village
Best support model Monthly donors
Current gap People think donations are too small to matter
What pooled gifts cover Food, medicine, emergency care, shelter, bedding

How a dog gets home

We do not rush the dog, or the adopter.

  1. 01

    Rescue

    The dog comes from a shelter, a crisis, or a situation where waiting means losing them.

  2. 02

    Rehab

    We assess the dog in real life: health, fear, dog behavior, people behavior, and what they can handle.

  3. 03

    Filter

    The adoption path tells applicants what the dog needs before anyone falls in love with a photo.

  4. 04

    Home

    The dog goes home only when the match is real. Support continues after adoption.

Underdog Heroes

Riverside, California rescue for power-breed dogs most people already counted out.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
